biological_replicate: we treated wild-type or Vhl-mutant mice with high (75 mg/kg), medium (60 mg/kg), and low (45 mg/kg) doses of glyoxylate acid (GA).
experimental_design: we employed glyoxylate-induced CaOx nephrocalcinosis mouse model.
factor_value: high (75 mg/kg), medium (60 mg/kg), and low (45 mg/kg) doses of glyoxylate acid (GA)
